577:         payload: {
578:           code: deployment.error?.code ?? 'deployment_failed',
579:           message: deployment.error?.message ?? 'Deployment failed',
580:         },
581:       });
582:     }
583: 
584:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
585:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
586:       status: 'failed',
587:       errorCode: deployment.error?.code ?? null,
588:       errorMessage: deployment.error?.message ?? null,
589:     });
590:     return;
591:   }
592: 
593:   if (deployment.status === 'cancelled') {
594:     const hasCancelledEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
595:       env.DB,
596:       workspaceId,
597:       deploymentId,
598:       'deployment_cancelled'
599:     );
600:     if (!hasCancelledEvent) {
601:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
602:         workspaceId,
603:         deploymentId,
604:         eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
605:         payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
606:       });
607:     }
608: 
609:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
610:       deploymentId: deployment.id,
611:       status: 'cancelled',
612:       errorCode: null,
613:       errorMessage: null,
614:     });
615:   }
616: }

618: async function markDeploymentCancelled(
619:   env: Env,
620:   workspaceId: string,
621:   deploymentId: string,
622:   reason: string
623: ): Promise<void> {
624:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
625:   const cancelledUpdate = await env.DB
626:     .prepare(
627:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
628:        SET status = 'cancelled',
629:            result_json = ?,
630:            error_code = NULL,
631:            error_message = NULL,
632:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
633:            updated_at = ?
634:        WHERE id = ?
635:          AND workspace_id = ?
636:          AND status IN ('queued', 'running')`
637:     )
638:     .bind(JSON.stringify({ reason }), now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
639:     .run();
640: 
641:   if ((cancelledUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
642:     return;
643:   }
644: 
645:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
646:     workspaceId,
647:     deploymentId,
648:     eventType: 'deployment_cancelled',
649:     payload: { reason },
650:   });
651:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
652:     deploymentId,
653:     status: 'cancelled',
654:     errorCode: null,
655:     errorMessage: null,
656:   });
657: }

659: function isRunningDeploymentStale(startedAt: string | null): boolean {
660:   if (!startedAt) {
661:     return false;
662:   }
663: 
664:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
665:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
666:     return false;
667:   }
668: 
669:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
670: }

679: async function executeWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
680:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
681:   if (!deployment) {
682:     return;
683:   }
684:   const payload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
685:   if (!payload) {
686:     throw new PolicyError('deployment_not_found', 'Deployment payload no longer exists');
687:   }
688: 
689:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
690:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
691:     throw new PolicyError('workspace_not_ready', 'Workspace is not ready for deployment');
692:   }
693: 
694:   const validation =
695:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
696:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
697:       : {};
698:   const autoFix =
699:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
700:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
701:       : {};
702:   const cache =
703:     payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
704:       ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
705:       : {};
706:   const requestedToolchain =
707:     payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
708:       ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
709:       : null;
710:   const deploy =
711:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
712:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
713:       : {};
714:   const validationOptions: DeploymentValidationOptions = {
715:     runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
716:     runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
717:   };
718:   const autoFixOptions: DeploymentAutoFixOptions = {
719:     rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
720:     bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
721:   };
722:   const cacheOptions: DeploymentCacheOptions = {
723:     dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
724:   };
725:   const publishOptions: DeploymentPublishOptions = {
726:     provider: getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(payload.provider, env),
727:     outputDir: parseString(deploy.outputDir),
728:   };
729:   const { runBuildIfPresent, runTestsIfPresent } = validationOptions;
730:   const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true);
731:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
732:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
733:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
734:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
735:   try {
736:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);

739:   }

741:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && !publishOptions.outputDir) {
742:     throw new PolicyError(

744:       'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider'
745:     );
746:   }
747: 
748:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
749:   try {
750:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
751:   } catch (error) {
752:     if (!(error instanceof PolicyError) || error.code !== 'baseline_missing') {
753:       throw error;
754:     }
755: 
756:     if (!autoFixOptions.rehydrateBaseline) {
757:       throw error;
758:     }
759: 
760:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
761:       workspaceId,
762:       deploymentId,
763:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_attempted',
764:       payload: {},
765:     });

767:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
768:     if (!rehydrated) {
769:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
770:         workspaceId,
771:         deploymentId,
772:         eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_failed',
773:         payload: {},
774:       });

776:     }

778:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
779:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
780:       workspaceId,
781:       deploymentId,
782:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_succeeded',
783:       payload: {},
784:     });
785:   }
786: 
787:   const provenance =
788:     payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)

790:       : {};
791:   const taskId = typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' ? provenance.taskId : null;
792:   const operationId = typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' ? provenance.operationId : null;

806:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
807:     workspaceId,
808:     deploymentId,
809:     eventType: 'deployment_started',
810:     payload: {
811:       provider: deployment.provider,
812:       attemptCount: deployment.attemptCount,
813:       runBuildIfPresent,
814:       runTestsIfPresent,

820:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);

822:   let provider;
823:   let providerChecks;

841:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
842:     workspaceId,
843:     deploymentId,
844:     eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck',

846:       provider: publishOptions.provider,

865:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
866:     workspaceId,

1111:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);

706:       },

713:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
714:     return jsonResponse(
